creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
php5-xsl is missing for owncloud. This cause some 500 errors with mirall client (owncloud sync client).

Fix: Please add php5-xsl to owncloud port dependancy.

	Thanks

How-To-Repeat: 	Install owncloud from ports without php5-xsl. Sync some files with your client. Error 500 appears.
